To minimize the total number of shooting days while adhering to the constraint that no two consecutive scenes come from the same decade, we must arrange the scenes based on their release years. The release years are 1994 (1990-1999), 2004 (2000-2009), 2007 (2000-2009), 2012 (2010-2019), and 2015 (2010-2019). The decades are {1990-1999}, {2000-2009}, and {2010-2019}. The scenes from the same decade are 2004 and 2007 (both from 2000-2009), and 2012 and 2015 (both from 2010-2019). To avoid consecutive scenes from the same decade, we must interleave scenes from different decades. The optimal order is 1994 (4 days), 2004 (6 days), 2012 (10 days), 2007 (8 days), 2015 (12 days), which ensures no two consecutive scenes are from the same decade. This schedule uses 4+6+10+8+12 = 40 days total.
